SEARCH
Module it.polimi.ingsw.am37
Package it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers

Class KingdomController

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.GUIController
it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.KingdomController
All Implemented Interfaces:
PropertyChangeListener, EventListener
public class KingdomController extends GUIController implements PropertyChangeListener
This class is the controller for the Kingdom.fxml file. It manages the GUI of the Kingdom phase of the game.
